description: Tier economics — user distribution, usage rates, cost analysis, and per-tier profitability.

panels.description: Total registered users in the system. Complete user base regardless of activity level.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0

panels.title: Total Users

panels.description: How users are distributed across tiers. Each tier determines free usage limits and refill schedules.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(tier, 'unknown') as tier, COUNT(*) as user_count
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY user_count DESC

panels.title: Tier Distribution

panels.description: Average daily tier subsidy cost over the selected period. Calculated as total tier cost divided by number of days.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  SUM(total_price) as daily_cost
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Avg Daily Tier Cost

panels.description: Total tier subsidy cost (free pollen consumed) in the selected period. Only includes tier meter usage, not pack purchases.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time, SUM(total_price) as daily_cost FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier' AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Total Tier Cost

panels.description: Registered users broken down by tier. Tiers: Microbe (free), Spore, Seed, Flower, Nectar — each with increasing daily pollen allowances.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(tier, 'unknown') as tier, COUNT(*) as user_count
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY CASE tier
  WHEN 'nectar' THEN 1
  WHEN 'flower' THEN 2
  WHEN 'seed' THEN 3
  WHEN 'spore' THEN 4
  WHEN 'microbe' THEN 5
  ELSE 6
END

panels.title: Users by Tier

panels.description: Theoretical maximum daily cost if every user fully consumed their tier allowance. Actual costs are much lower due to low usage rates.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(CASE tier
  WHEN 'microbe' THEN 0
  WHEN 'spore' THEN 1.5/7.0
  WHEN 'seed' THEN 3
  WHEN 'flower' THEN 10
  WHEN 'nectar' THEN 20
  ELSE 0
END) as max_daily_liability
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0

panels.title: Max Daily Liability

panels.description: Actual daily cost from free tier usage, stacked by tier. This is real money spent subsidizing user usage each day.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe') as microbe,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore') as spore,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed') as seed,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower') as flower,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar') as nectar
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Tier Cost

panels.description: Total tier subsidy cost broken down by tier. Shows which tiers cost the most in free pollen.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe'), 2) as Microbe,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore'), 2) as Spore,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed'), 2) as Seed,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower'), 2) as Flower,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar'), 2) as Nectar
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)

panels.title: Tier Cost Distribution

panels.description: Daily cost from the internal pollen-router service account. Internal usage billed to tier meter but not attributable to any user tier.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) as time,
  SUM(total_price) as daily_router_cost
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_tier = 'router'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Router Cost

panels.description: What percentage of their daily allowance do users actually consume on average? Lower = users leave allocation unused = we save money.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT (SUM(total_price) / NULLIF(uniq(user_github_username) * GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) * 0, 0)) * 100 as Microbe FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND user_tier = 'microbe' AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'

WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT (SUM(total_price) / (uniq(user_github_username) * GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) * (1.5/7.0))) * 100 as Spore FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND user_tier = 'spore' AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'

WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT (SUM(total_price) / (uniq(user_github_username) * GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) * 3)) * 100 as Seed FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND user_tier = 'seed' AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'

WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT (SUM(total_price) / (uniq(user_github_username) * GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) * 10)) * 100 as Flower FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND user_tier = 'flower' AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'

WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT (SUM(total_price) / (uniq(user_github_username) * GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) * 20)) * 100 as Nectar FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND user_tier = 'nectar' AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'

panels.title: Tier Usage Rate

panels.description: Pollen split for Microbe users: how much comes from free tier vs paid packs.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  round(sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'), 2) as Tier,
  round(sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack'), 2) as Pack
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND user_tier = 'microbe'
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)

panels.title: Pack vs Tier (Microbe)

panels.title: Pack vs Tier (Nectar)

panels.description: Total remaining tier pollen across active users at end of each day, by tier. Shows how tier budgets deplete between refills.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE banned = 1
  GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT day as time, round(sumIf(last_balance, user_tier = 'microbe'), 2) as microbe, round(sumIf(last_balance, user_tier = 'spore'), 2) as spore, round(sumIf(last_balance, user_tier = 'seed'), 2) as seed, round(sumIf(last_balance, user_tier = 'flower'), 2) as flower, round(sumIf(last_balance, user_tier = 'nectar'), 2) as nectar FROM (SELECT toStartOfDay(start_time) as day, user_id, user_tier, argMax(balances['v1:meter:tier'], start_time) as last_balance FROM generation_event WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300 AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users) GROUP BY day, user_id, user_tier) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Remaining Tier Balance

panels.description: Average daily tier subsidy cost per active user, by tier. How much each user costs us per day in free pollen.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
days AS (
  SELECT GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) as num_days
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
)
SELECT
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'nectar'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Nectar,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'flower'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Flower,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'seed'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Seed,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'spore'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Spore,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'microbe'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Microbe
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier'
  AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)

panels.title: Tier Cost / User / Day

panels.description: Average daily pack spend per active user, by tier. How much each user pays us per day. Compare with tier cost to find profitable tiers.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
days AS (
  SELECT GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) as num_days
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack'
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
)
SELECT
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'nectar'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Nectar,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'flower'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Flower,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'seed'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Seed,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'spore'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Spore,
  round(sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe') / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'microbe'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Microbe
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack'
  AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)

panels.title: Pack Revenue / User / Day

panels.description: Net value per user per day = pack revenue minus tier cost, divided by users and days. Positive = profitable tier, negative = subsidized.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
days AS (
  SELECT GREATEST(1, dateDiff('day', min(toDate(start_time)), max(toDate(start_time))) + 1) as num_days
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
)
SELECT
  round((sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack') - sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier')) / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'nectar'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Nectar,
  round((sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack') - sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier')) / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'flower'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Flower,
  round((sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack') - sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier')) / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'seed'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Seed,
  round((sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack') - sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier')) / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'spore'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Spore,
  round((sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:pack') - sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe' AND selected_meter_slug = 'v1:meter:tier')) / nullIf(uniqIf(user_github_username, user_tier = 'microbe'), 0) / (SELECT num_days FROM days), 3) as Microbe
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND is_billed_usage = true AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)

panels.title: Net Value / User / Day

title: Tier Economics
